# Fine Leg Talk

> Cricket analysis, match reviews and honest opinion from a passionate fan. Covering Test cricket, IPL, ODIs and the stories behind the game.

## Site

- Homepage: https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/
- Blog: https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/blogs.html
- Match Centre: https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/matches.html
- Videos: https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/videos.html
- Stats: https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/stats.html
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@FineLegTalk

- [IPL vs International Cricket: Has the Balance Finally Shifted Too Far?](https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/ipl-vs-international-cricket-2025.html)
- [Remembering 2011: What Dhoni's World Cup Final Still Teaches Us About Captaincy](https://fine-leg-talk.vercel.app/dhoni-2011-world-cup-captaincy.html)

## About

Fine Leg Talk is an independent cricket blog and YouTube channel run by a cricket fan. Content focuses on in-depth analysis rather than news reporting — match reviews, player technique breakdowns, historical pieces, and opinion on the state of the game. No paywalls, no sponsored content.
